list.name: Changes
list.comment: Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow

changelist.name: Changes
changelist.comment: Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow

task.summary: Fixed LightAudio download tracks, added user agents
Soundcloud moved to own module into another jar
Added aspects style to key binds
Added system volume control from mouse wheel
refactor: track parse method moved to Track.java
tests: added AnimationsTest.java a test class
added: Profilers classes aspects to KeyBindingController.java
Root refactored to singleton and object specification
Fixed the problem of not being able to download and use audio files from services has been fixed - a redirect has been added
Fixed the bug of incorrect loading of statistics, which consisted of initializing the controller BEFORE loading the actual data, has been resolved.
Fixed a bug with incorrect width calculation for selectionRect when selecting, and a bug with merging some colors (now they are just darker)
Python scripts for buildings extended new additional input functional
TrackHistory logic migrate to super class History.java, and now is extended History.java
Minor bugs fixed, and netty track listcell optimized
Hitmos.java parsing from server html fixed
Fixed bug with stretch list cell ass
Fixed bug with blocking thread close in netty track processing
Intro sound relocated to self class
Added new logo path to resources
Anvil mods load updated to ignoring module-info and throwable exceptions
Added progress bar to initialize splash window
Added json localization messages to splash window
Added json parse method to FileManager
Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow

MESSAGE.value: Hitmos.java parsing from server html fixed
Fixed bug with stretch list cell ass
Fixed bug with blocking thread close in netty track processing
Intro sound relocated to self class
Added new logo path to resources
Anvil mods load updated to ignoring module-info and throwable exceptions
Added progress bar to initialize splash window
Added json localization messages to splash window
Added json parse method to FileManager
Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow
